return(function(l,v,X,G,Z,r,J,f,M,R,b,H,y,K,q,I,C,Q,a,w,t,Y)I,H,b,y,Q,Y,q,t,C,K,f,w,M,R,a=function(I,X,G,Z)local y4={}local v(J)end,function(l,j)local v=y(j)local X=function(X,G,Z,r)return I(l,{X;G,Z;r},j,v)end return X end,-692975+692975,function(l)for j=-915647+915648,#l,392914+-392913 do
